payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits read-only SELECT statements such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`; destructive statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied. No durable memory should be created from this fixture.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an operational/debug policy fixture rather than a durable user fact or preference.

details: Did not commit operational/debug fixture text as memory.
Preserved the distinction that SELECT is allowed and DELETE is denied.
